$comment: DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE.  It is generated automatically from typescript interfaces in the project.  To update, run `deno task schema` (with optional `--watch`).  In VSCode, this is run automatically for you on folder open.

QuoteSummaryModules.description: Type union of all available quote summary module names. Use this to specify which modules to include in your request.

formatted.description: Whether to return formatted strings instead of raw numbers. When true, numbers like 1000000 become "1.00M".

modules.description:
Which data modules to include in the response.
- Array of specific module names for targeted data
- "all" to get all available modules

QuoteSummaryOptions.description: Configuration options for quote summary requests.

symbol.description: - Stock, ETF, mutual fund, or other financial instrument symbol.   Use search() to find valid symbols.

queryOptionsOverrides.description: - Optional configuration:   - `modules`: Specific data modules to request   - `formatted`: Return formatted strings vs raw numbers

validateOptions.description: If false, lib won't validate and will leave that to Yahoo

validateResult.description: If false, will pass back unvalidated / untyped result from Yahoo

devel.description: Filename to use for cached result

fetch.description: An alternative fetch function to use just for this call
